PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?work ?workLabel WHERE {
  ?work wdt:P50 wd:Q5683 .
  ?work wdt:P921 ?theme .
  ?theme rdfs:label ?themeLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?themeLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?themeLabel) , 'religion') || CONTAINS(LCASE(?themeLabel) , 'christian') || CONTAINS(LCASE(?themeLabel) , 'religious') || CONTAINS(LCASE(?themeLabel) , 'saint') || CONTAINS(LCASE(?themeLabel) , 'bible'))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?work rdfs:label ?workLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?workLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
LIMIT 10
